docket_entries.description: MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 60578929) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOORE, JOHN

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-28-2017 Off Calendar

MOTION / Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-26-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Brian Johnson, Esq. (510-848-8880) of the Chanler Group for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. Plaintiff reports opposing Counsel has seen the proposed order and the stipulated Judgement. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JOHN MOORE's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment. The motion, to which no opposition is filed, is GRANTED. The settlement complies with the Health & Safety Code. Order and stipulated judgment are signed. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 711, ckaren@sftc.org =(302/RBU)
